diagnosis.root_cause: Memory leak in the Express process — RSS grows monotonically without a request spike
reasoning: requests_per_minute is a flat ~42 — the growth is not driven by load
db pool is nearly idle (2/10) and integrity is ok — not a database issue
a GC pause of 380ms appeared as memory got high
system memory at 88% — heading toward pressure if left unchecked

alternative_hypotheses.why_less_likely: growth is still linear at 2h with no sign of leveling off

impact.duration_estimate: hours until OOM if not restarted
impact.business_impact: Latencia crescente; risco de queda por falta de memoria mais tarde

actions.action: Restart the Express process to reset memory
actions.estimated_impact: Frees memory immediately; buys time to find the leak
actions.implementation: Stop and relaunch node server.js (or restart the scheduled task / service)

actions.action: If memory climbs again within 1-2h, audit code for leaks
actions.estimated_impact: Finds the root leak (dangling handlers, unbounded cache)
actions.implementation: Take heap snapshots before/after; diff retained objects
